codeReview.summary: The agent-api feature implementation is well-structured and fully meets the expected behavior requirements. The worker implemented three endpoints: GET /api/agents (list all), GET /api/agents/:id (get single with 404 handling), and GET /api/agents/:id/tasks (current and historical tasks via task_logs). The code follows the established patterns in the codebase with proper error handling, UUID validation, and comprehensive test coverage.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation correctly follows the established pattern of using Hono routers in src/api/routes/ and mounting them in src/server.ts. Error responses follow the standard format { error: string } as documented in AGENTS.md.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/api/routes/agents.ts:15-133 - Router structure matches other routes; src/server.ts:28 - Properly mounted with app.route('/api/agents', agentsRouter)

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker correctly used Zod for UUID validation as per project conventions, returning 400 for invalid UUID format before hitting the database.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/api/routes/agents.ts:9 - UUID_REGEX pattern defined; src/api/routes/agents.ts:12 - Zod schema for validation; src/api/routes/agents.ts:36-39 - Returns 400 for invalid UUID

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed the backend-worker skill procedure correctly: wrote tests first (RED), implemented the feature (GREEN), ran manual verification with curl, and executed all validators (typecheck, tests).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff shows 9 new tests added; transcript shows test-driven approach with bun test; verification commands include typecheck and manual curl tests

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation correctly handles the requirement for 'current and historical tasks' by querying both the tasks table (current assignments) and task_logs table (historical assignments), then deduplicating with Set.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/api/routes/agents.ts:82-95 - Queries current tasks via tasks.agentId and historical tasks via taskLogs.agentId, combines with Set to deduplicate

summary: The agent-api feature is fully implemented and meets all expected behaviors. The implementation includes: (1) GET /api/agents returning array with id, name, created_at, last_seen_at; (2) GET /api/agents/:id returning agent or 404 for non-existent; (3) GET /api/agents/:id/tasks returning both current and historical tasks via task_logs. Code quality is high with proper TypeScript types, Zod validation, error handling, and 9 comprehensive test cases. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
